ifc_item.name: IfcRelDeclares
ifc_item.definition: The objectified relationshipIfcRelDeclareshandles the declaration of objects (subtypes ofIfcObject) or properties (subtypes ofIfcPropertyDefinition) to a project or project library (represented byIfcProject, orIfcProjectLibrary).

ifc_item.name: ThermalTransmittance
ifc_item.definition: Thermal transmittance coefficient (U-Value) of the element.

ifc_item.name: IfcSite
ifc_item.definition: A site is a defined area of land, possibly covered with water, on which the project construction is to be completed. A site may be used to erect, retrofit or turn down building(s), or for other construction related developments.

values: aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

constraints.original_text: MUST be aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

ifc_item.name: IfcPersonAndOrganization
ifc_item.definition: This entity represents a person acting on behalf of an organization.

ifc_item.name: IfcRailing
ifc_item.definition: The railing is a frame assembly adjacent to human circulation spaces and at some space boundaries where it is used in lieu of walls or to compliment walls. Designed to aid humans, either as an optional physical support, or to prevent injury by falling.

ifc_item.name: IfcRelConnectsPathElements
ifc_item.definition: TheIfcRelConnectsPathElementsrelationship provides the connectivity information between two elements, which have path information.

ifc_item.name: IfcRailing
ifc_item.definition: The railing is a frame assembly adjacent to human circulation spaces and at some space boundaries where it is used in lieu of walls or to compliment walls. Designed to aid humans, either as an optional physical support, or to prevent injury by falling.

ifc_item.name: IfcGeographicElement
ifc_item.definition: AnIfcGeographicElementis a generalization of all elements within a geographical landscape. It includes occurrences of typical geographical elements, often referred to as features, such as trees or terrain. Common type information behind several occurrences ofIfcGeographicElementis provided by theIfcGeographicElementType.

ifc_item.name: IfcAxis2Placement3D
ifc_item.definition: TheIfcAxis2Placement3Dprovides location and orientations to place items in a three-dimensional space. The attributeAxisdefines the Z direction,RefDirectionthe X direction. The Y direction is derived.

ifc_item.name: IfcVoidingFeature
ifc_item.definition: A voiding feature is a modification of an element which reduces its volume. Such a feature may be manufactured in different ways, for example by cutting, drilling, or milling of members made of various materials, or by inlays into the formwork of cast members made of materials such as concrete.

stage_c_mappings.original_text: The site MUST have a Name attribute assigned
The site MUST be aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

values: aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

constraints.original_text: MUST be aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

stage_c_mappings.original_text: Sites may define existing and proposed terrain in the vicinity of the bridge project
Boring points may also be included as objects contained within the site

specifications.name: Site Entity Aggregation and Identification
specifications.description: Validates that IfcSite entities are properly aggregated within an IfcProject and have required identification attributes.

partOf.instructions: PartOf relationship: The site MUST be aggregated as part of an IfcProject entity through an IfcRelAggregates relationship

value.simpleValue: The site MUST have a Name attribute assigned

ifc_item.name: IfcTubeBundleType
ifc_item.definition: The energy conversion device typeIfcTubeBundleTypedefines commonly shared information for occurrences of tube bundles. The set of shared information may include\:common properties with shared property setscommon representationscommon materialscommon composition of elementscommon portsIt is used to define a tube bundle type specification indicating the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type. TheIfcTubeBundleTypemay be declared withinIfcProjectorIfcProjectLibraryusingIfcRelDeclaresand may be exchanged with or without occurrences of the type. Occurrences ofIfcTubeBundleTypeare represented by instances ofIfcTubeBundle. Refer to the documentation atIfcTubeBundlefor supported property sets, materials, composition, and ports.

ifc_item.name: IfcStructuralConnection
ifc_item.definition: AnIfcStructuralConnectionrepresents a structural connection object (node connection, edge connection, or surface connection) or supports.

ifc_item.name: IfcGridAxis
ifc_item.definition: An individual axis,IfcGridAxis, is defined in the context of a design grid. The axis definition is based on a curve of dimensionality 2. The grid axis is positioned within the XY plane of the position coordinate system defined by theIfcGrid.

ifc_item.name: IfcOffsetCurve3D
ifc_item.definition: AnIfcOffsetCurve3Dis a curve defined by an offset in 3D space from itsBasisCurve.

ifc_item.name: IfcBoundedCurve
ifc_item.definition: AnIfcBoundedCurveis a curve of finite length.

stage_c_mappings.original_text: span location of the bridge relative to an alignment

ifc_item.name: Area
ifc_item.definition: Area of the space.

stage_c_mappings.original_text: starting and ending distances along the curve

ifc_item.name: Area
ifc_item.definition: Area of the space.
